title: An Act establishing a sick leave bank for Richard Curley, an employee of the Middlesex Sheriff’s Office

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Cronin, a petition (accompanied by bill) (subject to Joint Rule 12) of John J. Cronin for legislation to establish a sick leave bank for Richard Curley, an employee of the Middlesex Sheriff’s Office.  Public Service.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
